entries.reference: A fẹ́ àwọn ọ̀rọ̀ ní gbólóhùn pípé.

entries.source: I will go to the beach.
There are islands in the sea.
I want to buy a book.
His money is in the bank.
Did you go to the market yesterday?
entries.reference: Ṣé o lọ sọjà ni àna?

entries.source: I'm going to go to the beach.
I don't want to go to school!
entries.reference: Mi ò fẹ́ lọ sí ilé-ẹ́kọ́.

entries.source: I don't want to go to school.
entries.reference: Mi ò fẹ́ lọ sí ilé-ẹ́kọ́.

entries.source: Currently Burj Khalifa is the tallest skyscraper in the world.
entries.reference: Burj Khalifa je agbar tó ga ju ni gbògbó ayè.

entries.source: Burj Khalifa is currently the tallest skyscraper in the world.
